data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: End-to-end encryption protects user data both in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit, AES encryption for stored data.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Sophisticated measures to mitigate Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Real-time monitoring and automated traffic filtering.

data.title: User Authentication Systems
data.description: Robust authentication methods to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Multi-factor authentication supported, OAuth 2.0 for third-party logins.

data.title: Security Audits and Penetration Testing
data.description: Regular security audits and testing to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Internal and third-party audits with automated and manual testing.

data.title: AI-Powered Threat Detection
data.description: Machine learning models are used to detect and respond to potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Continuous learning algorithms with anomaly detection capabilities.
